message:
test(unit): expand inline tests for concurrent_map, self_stabilize, wal_engine (+95) (wa-1u90p.7.1)

concurrent_map.rs: +35 tests — ShardedMap/PaneMap Debug/Default, shard clamping,
nonexistent key ops, for_each_mut, map_all_mut, retain all/none, DistributionStats edges.

self_stabilize.rs: +28 tests — ReconcileMessage/RoundResult/Phase trait coverage,
ReconcileConfig defaults, ReconcileSession state machine (converged msg, rounds,
non-authority narrowing, level hash match, patch apply), ReconcileStats, StateFingerprint.

wal_engine.rs: +32 tests — WalConfig/WalEntry/EntryKind/WalStats trait coverage,
WalEngine clone independence, iterator boundaries (since/range/replay), compact/truncate
edge cases, ReplayCursor empty/inverted/checkpoint-skip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
